recommendations.title: The Feels
recommendations.overview: A lesbian bachelorette weekend goes awry when one of the brides admits she's never had an orgasm.

recommendations.title: The Seventh Company Outdoors
recommendations.overview: The third part of Seventh Company adventures.

recommendations.title: The Quest
recommendations.overview: Ghang-gheng, the ancient winner-take-all competition in which the deadliest fighters from around the world employ the most spectacular feats of martial arts skills ever displayed in order to win the prized Golden Dragon. But fighting prowess alone wi

recommendations.title: Toxic Shark
recommendations.overview: A tropical singles retreat takes a terrifying turn when guests realize a poisonous shark is infesting the surrounding water. Not only will it rip apart its victims, but it also uses projectile acid to hunt - in and out of the water.

recommendations.title: Lord of the Flies
recommendations.overview: When their plane crashes, 25 schoolboys find themselves trapped on a tropical island, miles from civilization.

recommendations.title: Red Planet
recommendations.overview: Astronauts search for solutions to save a dying Earth by searching on Mars, only to have the mission go terribly awry.

recommendations.title: King Kong vs. Godzilla
recommendations.genres: Action, Science Fiction, Comedy, Adventure, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: When an underhanded pharmaceutical company goes to a remote tropical island to steal King Kong for advertising purposes, they get more than they bargained for when the gigantic ape attacks an unsuspecting village and an enormous octopus.

recommendations.title: The Seventh Company Has Been Found
recommendations.overview: The second part of the Seventh Company adventures.

recommendations.title: Tactical Force
recommendations.overview: A training exercise for the LAPD SWAT Team goes terribly wrong when they find themselves pitted against two rival gangs while trapped in an abandoned Hangar, armed with nothing but blanks.

recommendations.title: The Red Turtle
recommendations.overview: The dialogue-less film follows the major life stages of a castaway on a deserted tropical island populated by turtles, crabs and birds.
